jobs.prompt: Editorial illustration on warm cream parchment background: a perfect triangular pyramid of smooth rounded stones arranged in horizontal tiers, the single largest stone at the top glowing softly terracotta, stones gradually smaller toward the wide base; one stone from the base drifts upward along a gentle dotted arc, suggesting it is sifting up through the tiers. Purely abstract shapes, balanced composition. Absolutely no text, no letters, no digits, no numerals, no labels, no arrows with captions. Deep ink outlines, dusty blue and terracotta accents, generous negative space, quiet premium academic atmosphere.
